ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group (e.g., American Indian, Asian) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals in this demographic group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of this demographic group within the total population */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district this data belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state this data belongs to */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ethnic_groups table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the population_data_sources table */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic data was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the accuracy of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES population_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Census, Survey) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  "collection_year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry that changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES demographic_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data updates, report availability) */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the notification is enabled or disabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the population_data_sources table */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported */,
  "num_records_imported" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  "error_log" TEXT /* Error log for the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES population_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was exported */,
  "num_records_exported" INTEGER /* Number of records exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
